synopsis:
This is the eight issue from Marvel Comics The High Republic (2023) Series and is part of Phase III: Trials of the Jedi from The High Republic Series
ENTER…BARON BOOLAN!
TEY SIRREK, LOURNA DEE and SSKEER on a dangerous mission.
KEEVE TRENNIS and the other JEDI helpless to assist.
The NIHIL'S mysterious MINISTER OF ADVANCEMENT finally revealed…along with his diabolical experiments.
PROTECT THE PATH!
title: The High Republic (2023) #08
